faq.question1: What guarantee does Start Companies offer?
faq.answer1: We offer a satisfaction guarantee: if you are not satisfied with the work performed, we refund your money. You can also pay after your LLC is created and fully operational. Our goal is to give you peace of mind throughout the process.
faq.question2: How long does it take to open an LLC?
faq.answer2: We open them within 7 to 10 business days. We focus on offering a hassle-free, transparent process with maximum support for an efficient experience.
faq.question3: How can I transfer money legally to the U.S.?
faq.answer3: Transferring money to the U.S. is simple if you comply with local and U.S. regulations. You can use platforms such as Wise, Binance, or Dólar App. A good combination is Wise for personal transfers and Binance for converting funds to USDT.
faq.question4: What requirements are needed to open an LLC?
faq.answer4: To open an LLC you need:

answer4List.2: Proof of residence address (verifiable with a utility bill).
answer4List.3: Choice of state where you will register the LLC.
answer4List.5: Payment of state and service costs. Our team will guide you through each step of the process to ensure everything is in order.

faq.question5: How much does it cost to open an LLC?
faq.answer5: The cost depends on the selected state. At Start Companies, we offer services starting at $499 in New Mexico up to $600 in states like Delaware, Wyoming, or Florida. This price includes:

answer5List.2: General advisory on LLC legal obligations.

faq.question6: What taxes do I need to pay in the U.S. with my LLC?
faq.answer6: If your LLC has no physical presence or nexus in the U.S., you only need to file forms (1120+5472 or 1065). If you do have nexus, you must pay taxes, request an ITIN, and comply with U.S. tax filings.
faq.answer7: At Start Companies, we are experts in forming LLCs for foreigners. We offer:

answer7List.3: Documentation ready to open a bank account.
answer7List.4: Competitive prices with no hidden costs.
answer7List.5: Satisfaction guarantee: If you are not satisfied, we refund your money.
answer7List.6: Flexible payment: You can pay after the process is completed.

PRIVACY.title: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.intro: At Ebizboost LLC (legal name), commercially operating as Start Companies ("Start Companies", "we"), we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you provide to us. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, for what purpose, for how long we keep it, with whom we share it and what your rights are. It applies to the entire website startcompanies.us, our landing pages and the forms associated with our services for LLC formation and bank account opening in the United States.

controller.title: 1. Data controller
controller.body: Ebizboost LLC (legal name), commercially operating as Start Companies. Website: startcompanies.us. If you have privacy questions, please use the contact channels published on the site.

items.1: Identification and contact: name, email, phone, country/city.
items.2: Basic business information related to LLC formation and management.
items.4: Technical and usage data: IP, device/browser type, pages viewed, referrals.
items.5: Form data (e.g., LLC opening, renewal, Relay, Fixcal, Abotax).

items.1: Directly from you when you complete forms or schedule a call.
items.2: Automatically through cookies and similar analytics and performance technologies.
items.3: Through third-party integrations necessary to provide our services (e.g., scheduling or communication tools).

items.1: Respond to inquiries and provide initial advice (legitimate interest and/or pre-contractual performance).
items.3: Improve the site, the experience and our processes (legitimate interest).
items.4: Operational and/or informative communications related to the services (legitimate interest/contract).

cookies.title: 5. Cookies and analytics
cookies.body: We use cookies necessary for the operation of the site and, where appropriate, performance/analytics cookies to understand usage and optimize content. You can control the use of cookies from your browser settings. By continuing to browse, you agree to their use as described in this Policy.

sharing.title: 6. With whom we share data

items.1: Technology providers that help us operate the site and forms.
items.2: Scheduling/communication tools necessary to coordinate meetings and provide support.
items.3: When required by law, competent authorities.

sharing.note: We do not sell your personal data. We only share what is necessary to provide and improve services, or due to legal requirements.

transfers.title: 7. International transfers
transfers.body: Since we provide services in the United States, your data may be hosted or processed in infrastructures located outside your country. We take reasonable measures to protect them in accordance with appropriate security and privacy standards.

retention.title: 8. Retention periods
retention.body: We retain data as long as necessary for the stated purposes, the provision of the service, legal compliance or until you request its deletion where appropriate.

rights.title: 9. Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may exercise rights such as access, rectification, update, objection, portability or deletion. To exercise them, contact us through the means published on the site, indicating your request and proving your identity.

security.title: 10. Security
security.body: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss or alteration. However, no system is 100% secure.

minors.title: 11. Minors
minors.body: Our services are aimed at adults. We do not knowingly collect data from minors without verifiable consent from their legal representatives.

updates.title: 12. Updates to this Policy
updates.body: We may update this Policy to reflect legal, technical or operational changes. The current version will be published on startcompanies.us and will indicate the last update date.

contact.title: 13. Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about privacy or the processing of your data, contact us through the official channels published on the site.

user_data_deletion.title: 14. User data deletion
user_data_deletion.body: In compliance with Meta Platform Terms and privacy best practices, we handle data deletion requests originating from any of our channels and services (website, forms, CRM, email, messaging/Meta and operational records). Deletion applies to contact data, form-submitted content, interaction histories and preferences, unless there is a legal obligation to retain data (e.g., tax, accounting or fraud prevention). Below we outline general guidelines and Meta-bot specifics:

meta_compliance.title: 14.1 Compliance with Meta Platform Terms
meta_compliance.content: Our WhatsApp/Meta bot strictly complies with Meta Platform Terms, including: (a) We do not process Platform Data without valid user consent to build profiles; (b) We do not attempt to decode, circumvent, re-identify, de-anonymize, unscramble, unencrypt, or reverse hash Platform Data; (c) We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect Platform Data against unauthorized access; (d) We maintain a clear and accessible privacy policy that explains how we collect, use and share data.

bot_interaction.title: 14.2 Bot interaction data
bot_interaction.content: Data collected through interactions with our WhatsApp/Meta bot includes: sent messages, information provided during conversations, user preferences, and contact data. This data is processed solely to provide the requested service and improve user experience, always with explicit user consent.

deletion_process.title: 14.3 Deletion process
deletion_process.content: Users can request deletion of their data through the following methods:

methods.2: Sending a request by email to administracion@starcompanies.us

deletion_process.verification: All deletion requests require identity verification to protect user privacy.

retention_period.title: 14.4 Retention period
retention_period.content: Bot interaction data is retained for a maximum period of 12 months from the last interaction, after which it is automatically deleted from our systems, unless legal obligations require longer retention. This period complies with Meta Platform Terms standards.

automatic_deletion.title: 14.5 Automatic deletion
automatic_deletion.content: We implement automated processes that delete user data after the established retention period. Deleted data includes: conversation history, shared personal information, user preferences, and any identifiable data associated with the user's Meta account. Data is deleted securely and irreversibly.

security_measures.title: 14.6 Security measures
security_measures.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect Platform Data against unauthorized access, including: data encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access controls, regular security audits, and compliance with Meta security standards.

verification.title: 14.7 Deletion verification
verification.content: Once the deletion request is processed, we will confirm to the user that their data has been deleted from our systems. This confirmation will be sent through the same channel used for the request (bot, email, or direct support). We maintain deletion records for audit and compliance purposes.

intermediary.title: Scope of service and disclaimer
intermediary.body: Ebizboost LLC acts as an intermediary in the facilitation of legal and banking procedures in the U.S. It is not part of government entities and has no alliances with banks. It is not responsible for the misuse of accounts or incorrect information. By scheduling a call and accepting the requirements sent, the user accepts the no-refund clause. Additionally, Ebizboost LLC will share only the essential information related to the requirements explained and sent after the conversation. The user implicitly accepts, either verbally or through any official contact channel, that the information provided is correct and complete.

TERMS.title: Terms and Conditions
TERMS.intro: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern access to and use of the startcompanies.us website and the services offered by Ebizboost LLC (legal name), commercially operating as Start Companies ("Start Companies"). By using the site or contracting our services, you accept these Terms.

services.title: 1. Services
services.body: We provide services related to the formation and management of LLCs in the United States, as well as advice and support for bank account opening (e.g., Relay) and related procedures. The information published is for informational purposes and does not constitute legal or tax advice.

items.1: You must provide truthful and updated information in forms and communications.
items.2: Use of the site for unlawful purposes or to harm third parties is prohibited.
items.3: We may modify, suspend or limit access to the site for maintenance or operational reasons.

contracting.title: 3. Contracting and payments
contracting.body: Before contracting, we will inform you of the scope of the service, estimated times and applicable costs. Payments will be made through the enabled means and may be subject to refund policies detailed in the specific proposal or contract.

items.1: Your responsibility: provide correct data and the required documentation in a timely manner.
items.2: Our responsibility: perform the contracted services with diligence and good faith.
items.3: Limitation: we do not guarantee results beyond our control (e.g., banking or state decisions).

ip.title: 5. Intellectual property
ip.body: The content of the site (texts, trademarks, graphics, images and code) is owned by Start Companies or its authors and is protected by applicable laws. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

privacy.title: 6. Personal data and privacy
privacy.body: The processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the site or our services, you confirm that you have read it and accept its content.

third_party.title: 7. Third-party links and tools
third_party.body: The site may include links or third-party integrations (e.g., scheduling, messaging and analytics). We do not control their content or policies; we recommend reviewing their terms and privacy notices.

modifications.title: 8. Modifications
modifications.body: We may update these Terms to reflect legal, technical or operational changes. The current version will be published on startcompanies.us and will indicate the last update date.

law.title: 9. Governing law
law.body: These Terms will be interpreted in accordance with the applicable laws in the jurisdiction where we operate. In case of dispute, we will seek to resolve it in good faith; if not possible, it will be submitted to the competent courts.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.body: For inquiries related to these Terms, use the contact methods published on the site.

forms_renovacion_llc.llc_name_help: Must match exactly as in the Articles of Organization.

forms_renovacion_llc.ein_help: The EIN document is in the client's Google Drive folder, under 'EIN Letter' in the 'Main Documents' subfolder. Enter your EIN in XX-XXXXXXX format (e.g. 12-3456789).
forms_renovacion_llc.llc_creation_help: Extract the date from the EIN letter (CP 575 or Letter 147C) to ensure it matches the official record.
forms_renovacion_llc.countries_business: Countries where the LLC does business

forms_renovacion_llc.declaration_types: Select the filing type (you may choose several)
forms_renovacion_llc.declaration_help: Select one or more options. If unsure, contact our team.
forms_renovacion_llc.multi_member_hint: Multi-member LLC: the sum of ownership percentages must be exactly 100%.
forms_renovacion_llc.no_owners: No owners added. Please add at least one owner.
forms_renovacion_llc.opening_cost: How much did it cost to open the LLC in the United States?
forms_renovacion_llc.paid_family: How much did the LLC pay to the owner's family for work or services?

forms_renovacion_llc.paid_dissolution: How much was paid for LLC dissolution (if applicable)?
forms_renovacion_llc.bank_balance_eoy: Year-end balance of the LLC bank accounts
forms_renovacion_llc.ssn_label: SSN/ITIN number (if any; otherwise leave blank)
forms_renovacion_llc.capital_2025_help: Personal funds transferred as capital. Excludes loans.
forms_renovacion_llc.loans_2025_help: Amount lent from personal or other accounts. Excludes capital contributions.
forms_renovacion_llc.loans_repaid_help: Loans from the owner repaid by the LLC. Excludes capital withdrawals.
forms_renovacion_llc.withdrawals_help: Transfers from LLC accounts to the owner's personal account.
forms_renovacion_llc.q_investments_us: Does the owner have investments or assets in the US?

forms_renovacion_llc.q_us_citizen: Is the owner a US citizen?
forms_renovacion_llc.q_us_31_days: Was the owner in the US more than 31 days in 2025?
forms_renovacion_llc.total_revenue_hint: Total gross revenue generated by the LLC from January 1 to December 31, {{year}}, across all associated bank accounts.
forms_renovacion_llc.q_financial_investments: Does the LLC have financial investments or assets in the United States?
forms_renovacion_llc.q_filed_taxes_before: Has the LLC filed taxes before?
forms_renovacion_llc.q_constituted_with_sc: Was the LLC formed with Start Companies?

forms_renovacion_llc.doc_boi_hint: Please upload a PDF of the BOI report.
forms_renovacion_llc.bank_info_hint: Please upload a PDF with December {{year}} bank statements for all banks associated with the LLC.

forms_apertura_llc.names_intro: Provide three possible names for your LLC, including 'LLC' at the end.
forms_apertura_llc.llc_suffix_hint: Remember that 'LLC' must be at the end of the name.
forms_apertura_llc.state_locked_hint: The state was selected in the previous step and cannot be changed.
forms_apertura_llc.main_activity_ph: Briefly describe the main activity your company will perform.
forms_apertura_llc.plan_single_only: This plan only allows Single Member.
forms_apertura_llc.s2_ensure_all: Make sure you enter information for all owners or members.
forms_apertura_llc.multi_sum_hint: Multi-member LLC: the sum of ownership percentages for all members must be exactly 100%.
forms_apertura_llc.file_formats_member: Formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX (max. 10MB)
forms_apertura_llc.s3_warning: Important: The address on the utility bill and bank statement must match, as must the LLC holder name on both documents. If they do not match, the bank may reject the application.
forms_apertura_llc.service_bill_hint: Upload a utility bill from the last 3 months as proof of address. Formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX (max. 10MB)
forms_apertura_llc.bank_statement_hint: Upload your bank statement showing the same address as on the utility bill. Formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX (max. 10MB)
forms_apertura_llc.q_periodic_10k: Will you have periodic income totaling USD 10,000 or more in the next three months?

forms_apertura_llc.bank_linked_phone: Phone number linked to the bank account
forms_apertura_llc.bank_linked_phone_ph: This number must be able to receive SMS. Include the country code.
forms_apertura_llc.expected_activity_ph: Describe expected use of the bank account (e.g. receiving payments from international clients).

forms_cuenta_bancaria.legal_name_help: Must match exactly as in the Articles of Organization. Do not include 'LLC'.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.brief_desc_help: The description must be clear and concise. Do not exceed 300 characters and include only relevant information about the company.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.ein_letter_hint: The EIN document is in the client's Google Drive folder, under 'EIN Letter' in the 'Main Documents' subfolder. Formats: PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG or DOCX (max. 10MB)
forms_cuenta_bancaria.ein_required: You must attach the EIN letter.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.articles_attach: Attach Articles of Organization or Certificate of Formation
forms_cuenta_bancaria.articles_required: You must attach the Articles of Organization or Certificate of Formation.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.file_formats_short: Formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX (max. 10MB)
forms_cuenta_bancaria.ra_address_hint: Enter the Registered Agent address as it appears in the Articles of Organization.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.countries_business_llc: Countries where you do business with your LLC
forms_cuenta_bancaria.countries_multi_hint: Hold Ctrl (or Cmd on Mac) to select multiple countries.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.passport_ph: As shown on the passport, including letters and numbers
forms_cuenta_bancaria.passport_attach_label: Attach a scanned copy or legible photo of the passport, ensuring it is valid.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.passport_copy_required: You must attach a copy of the passport.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.work_email_ph: This email will be used to sign in to Relay
forms_cuenta_bancaria.sms_capable: Must be able to receive SMS
forms_cuenta_bancaria.annual_income_q: How much do you earn per year?
forms_cuenta_bancaria.amount_usd_hint: The amount is expressed in USD
forms_cuenta_bancaria.owner_address_intro: Enter the owner's personal address to validate addresses.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.service_bill_hint: Must be no older than 3 months — must match this address — name and address must match. Formats: PDF, JPG, PNG (max. 10MB)
forms_cuenta_bancaria.service_bill_required: You must attach the utility bill.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.owners_info_hint: Provide information for all owners or partners.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.no_owners_cta: No owners added. Click "Add owner" to get started.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.single_member_pct: For a single-member LLC, the percentage is automatically 100%.
forms_cuenta_bancaria.passport_valid_required: You must attach a valid passport.
